assertion_results.text: The third JQL query uses labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA) to find triaged CVEs still in a pre-QA state
assertion_results.evidence: In ready-for-qa.md line 11, the query is: "project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, 'ON_QA') ORDER BY created DESC" — matches the required labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA) filters.

assertion_results.text: For each query 3 result, the skill checks issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type Depend and fetches each linked Task's status
assertion_results.evidence: In ready-for-qa.md, each of the three candidates (TC-9020, TC-9023, TC-9026) has a "Linked remediation Tasks (Depend):" section. TC-9020 shows TC-9021 (Done) and TC-9022 (Closed); TC-9023 shows TC-9024 (Done) and TC-9025 (In Progress); TC-9026 shows "None". Each linked task's type and status are fetched and displayed.

assertion_results.text: TC-9020 is included in Ready for QA because ALL linked remediation Tasks are completed (TC-9021 Done, TC-9022 Closed)
assertion_results.evidence: In ready-for-qa.md lines 41-49, TC-9020 lists TC-9021 (Done) and TC-9022 (Closed) with analysis: "Both linked remediation Tasks are in terminal states (Done and Closed). All remediation work is complete." Result: "QUALIFIED -- Ready for QA". In discovery-listing.md line 60, TC-9020 appears in the Ready for QA table with Remediation Tasks "TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)".

assertion_results.text: TC-9023 is excluded from Ready for QA because TC-9025 is still In Progress — remediation is not complete
assertion_results.evidence: In ready-for-qa.md lines 65-75, TC-9023 shows TC-9025 with status "In Progress" and analysis: "TC-9024 is Done, but TC-9025 is still In Progress. Not all remediation Tasks are complete." Result: "EXCLUDED -- Remediation in progress". In discovery-listing.md line 66: "TC-9023 ... Excluded -- TC-9025 is still In Progress. Remediation is not yet complete."

assertion_results.text: TC-9026 is excluded from Ready for QA because it has no linked Tasks with type Depend — no remediation to verify
assertion_results.evidence: In ready-for-qa.md lines 88-93, TC-9026 shows "Linked remediation Tasks (Depend): None" with analysis: "This issue has no linked Tasks with link type 'Depend'. Without remediation tasks, there is nothing to verify in QA." Result: "EXCLUDED -- No remediation tasks to verify". In discovery-listing.md line 67: "TC-9026 ... Excluded -- no linked Tasks with type 'Depend'. No remediation to verify."

assertion_results.text: The Ready for QA section includes a Remediation Tasks column showing the linked tasks and their statuses
assertion_results.evidence: In discovery-listing.md lines 58-60, the Ready for QA table includes a "Remediation Tasks" column header and TC-9020's row shows "TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)" in that column.

assertion_results.text: For each Ready for QA issue, the output suggests transitioning to ON_QA
assertion_results.evidence: In discovery-listing.md line 62: "TC-9020: All linked remediation Tasks are complete. Consider transitioning to ON_QA." In ready-for-qa.md line 50: "Recommendation: Consider transitioning TC-9020 to ON_QA." TC-9020 is the only Ready for QA issue, and both files suggest the ON_QA transition.
